title: Animation vs Player
description: Adds Alan Becker's Animation vs Minecraft into the game! Currently in BETA phase so only limited features!
body:
This mod is a brand new take on Alan Becker's 'Animation vs Minecraft' series!

This mod is currently in BETA phase, so most features aren't yet implemented. More features and survival gameplay coming soon!

## FAQ:
- **How do I put a block in the staff?**: Hold the staff in your off hand with the block in your main hand and then right click.

## OTHER MODS:
Required:
- Geckolib
- Player Animator

Recommended:
- JEI

## CURRENT FEATURES:
Music Discs:
- Jazzy Note Blocks
- Green's Jam
- Note Block Battle
- Rhapsody in Blue
- Flight of the Bumblebee
- Rush E
  
Staffs:
- Purple Staff
- Blue Staff
- Light Blue Staff
- Grey Staff
- Black Staff
- Pink Staff
- Lucky Staff
  
Staff Blocks:
- Grass Block
- Stone
- Dirt
- Cobblestone
- Sand
- Oak Log
- Oak Planks
- Iron Block
- Cake
- Crafting Table (WIP)
- Diamond Block (WIP
- Dispenser (WIP)
- Egg
- Gold Block
- Grindstone (WIP)
- Lighting Rod
- Magma Block
- Netherite Block (WIP)
- Redstone Block (Very WIP, but essentially works)
- White Wool

Currently useless stuff:
- Different Minecraft App Icons
- Document
- File Folder
- Image
- Black Hole
- PC blocks
- Alan's PC dimension (empty)
  
Gamerules:
- Cooldown Percentage: Multiplies Staff Cooldowns by the given percentage.
- Unregistered Staff Items: Allows putting items that don't function in the staff into the staff.


**THIS MOD IS NOT AFFILIATED OR APPROVED BY ALAN BECKER**

Original Videos (CHECK THEM OUT IF YOU HAVEN'T ALREADY): https://www.youtube.com/@alanbecker
